SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

Class FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration.FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration
@AutoConfiguration(after=FailoverAutoConfiguration.class) @ConditionalOnExpression("${failover.enabled:true} eq true and ${failover.store.multitenant.enabled:false} eq true") @EnableConfigurationProperties(FailoverProperties.class) public class FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration extends Object
Autoconfiguration that activates when failover.store.multitenant.enabled=true.

Registers a multitenant-aware TenantStoreFactory for the configured store type. The application is responsible for providing a TenantResolver bean that returns the current tenant ID — this library does not supply built-in resolver implementations (header, security-context, etc.) because tenant resolution is always an application concern.

Author:
Anand Manissery

    Registers a per-tenant in-memory store factory (one independent map per tenant).

  • Constructor Details

    • FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration

      public FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration()

  • Method Details

    • tenantContextPropagator

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean public TenantContextPropagator tenantContextPropagator()
      Registers TenantContextPropagator so that scatter/gather slice tasks dispatched to executor threads carry the correct tenant ID. Picked up by FailoverAutoConfiguration and composed into the CompositeContextPropagator.
      Returns:
      TenantContextPropagator that captures and restores the tenant ID across thread boundaries

    • jdbcMultiTenantStoreFactory

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store", name="type", havingValue="jdbc") public TenantStoreFactory<Object> jdbcMultiTenantStoreFactory(FailoverProperties props, org.springframework.jdbc.core.JdbcTemplate jdbcTemplate, Serializer serializer, DatabaseResolver databaseResolver, PayloadColumnResolver payloadColumnResolver, org.springframework.jdbc.core.RowMapper<ReferentialPayload<Object>> rowMapper)
      Auto-configured JDBC TenantStoreFactory for the TABLE_PREFIX strategy.

      All tenants share the application's single JdbcTemplate. Per-tenant isolation is achieved purely via a different table name (tenantPrefix + globalPrefix + "FAILOVER_STORE").

      SCHEMA strategy requires a custom TenantStoreFactory. This bean is @ConditionalOnMissingBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) — declare your own TenantStoreFactory bean and it will replace this one. In the SCHEMA factory, map each tenantId to a dedicated JdbcTemplate backed by that tenant's own DataSource. See TenantConfig (schema field) for a usage example.

      Parameters:
      props - failover properties containing per-tenant configuration
      jdbcTemplate - shared JDBC template (all tenants use the same DataSource in TABLE_PREFIX mode)
      serializer - payload serializer
      databaseResolver - detects the database product for merge dialect selection
      payloadColumnResolver - determines the SQL type of the PAYLOAD column
      rowMapper - maps result-set rows to ReferentialPayload
      Returns:
      per-tenant JDBC store factory using the TABLE_PREFIX strategy

    • caffeineMultiTenantStoreFactory

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store", name="type", havingValue="caffeine") public TenantStoreFactory<Object> caffeineMultiTenantStoreFactory(FailoverClock failoverClock, FailoverProperties properties)
      Registers a per-tenant Caffeine store factory (one isolated cache per tenant).
      Parameters:
      failoverClock - clock used by each per-tenant Caffeine cache for expiry
      Returns:
      per-tenant Caffeine store factory

    • inmemoryMultiTenantStoreFactory

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store", name="type", havingValue="inmemory", matchIfMissing=true) public TenantStoreFactory<Object> inmemoryMultiTenantStoreFactory(FailoverProperties properties)
      Registers a per-tenant in-memory store factory (one independent map per tenant).
      Returns:
      per-tenant in-memory store factory
